web-app-migration.label: Web App Migration
web-app-migration.description: Lift-and-shift or re-platform of an existing web application to the cloud.
discoveryQuestions: What is driving the migration timeline — cost, a data center exit, or a scaling limitation?
What is the current architecture (monolith, microservices, on-prem VMs)?
What is the expected peak concurrent user load?
Are there compliance or data residency requirements (e.g. data must stay in-region)?
What is the acceptable downtime window for cutover?
Is there an existing CI/CD pipeline, or does one need to be built?
Who owns infrastructure sign-off on the client side?

genai-chatbot.label: GenAI Chatbot
genai-chatbot.description: Conversational AI assistant backed by a managed foundation model.
discoveryQuestions: What is the primary use case — customer support, internal knowledge base, or sales assistance?
What is the expected query volume per day/month?
Is there an existing knowledge base, and in what format (PDFs, wiki, database)?
Are there data privacy constraints on what can be sent to a foundation model?
Does the bot need to take actions (e.g. call APIs), or answer questions only?
What languages need to be supported?
What is the target response latency?

data-pipeline.label: Data Pipeline
data-pipeline.description: Automated ingestion, transformation, and storage of business data.
discoveryQuestions: What are the data sources (databases, APIs, flat files, streaming events)?
What is the expected daily data volume?
Does the pipeline need to run in batch, near-real-time, or streaming?
What transformations or business rules need to be applied?
Who consumes the output — a BI tool, another system, or end users directly?
Are there data retention or archival requirements?
What is the tolerance for data latency (minutes vs. hours)?

healthcare-ai.label: Healthcare AI
healthcare-ai.description: ML-driven diagnostics or triage platform on top of clinical data.
discoveryQuestions: What regulatory framework applies (HIPAA, local healthcare data laws)?
What is the source and format of clinical data (EHR exports, imaging, structured records)?
Is there a labeled dataset available for model training, or does one need to be created?
Who validates model outputs — a clinician-in-the-loop, or fully automated?
What is the required audit trail for predictions made?
Does inference need to happen in real time (e.g. at point of care) or in batch?
What existing systems does this need to integrate with (EHR, PACS, etc.)?
